COMP_ELIG_CHF Include Standardized PCC Heart Failure benes eligible for Cost Composite Indicator for whether specialty-adjusted and risk-adjusted Per Capita Costs for Beneficiaries with Heart Failure standardized performance score included in domain score for practice 1332 Num 8 Equals 1 if specialty-adjusted and risk-adjusted Per Capita Costs for Beneficiaries with Heart Failure
